title: Add groups to My Work section (e.g. split 'Later' into 'This month', 'Next month', 'This year', 'Next year' etc)
excerpt:
It would be really useful if you could add groups to the My Work section. Currently it has: 

Overdue
Today
This week
Next week
Later
Without a date

However, this means that everything past the next 14 days is lumped in…

posts.author: danit (Dani Treseder)
posts.cookedHtml:
It would be really useful if you could add groups to the My Work section. Currently it has:

  • Overdue
  • Today
  • This week
  • Next week
  • Later
  • Without a date

However, this means that everything past the next 14 days is lumped in together. My ‘Later’ category currently holds over a thousand items, from this month all the way to 2026 - with no easy way to review upcoming workload at a glance.

I’d love to be able to clearly see what I have coming up:

  • This month
  • Next month
  • This year
  • Next year

etc, or similar.

Adding this feature would really encourage and support my team to use Monday.com more!
